source_metadata.description:
Monday 1 December 2025 | Primary Production Committee

2024/25 Annual review of the Ministry for Primary Industries

Hearing of evidence:

Andrew Hoggard, Minister for Biosecurity, Minister for Food Safety, and Associate Minister for Agriculture (Animal Welfare)
